find_and_verify_professional_email_addre: Find and verify professional email addresses
full_raw_item_object_from_the_icypeas_re: Full raw item object from the Icypeas results endpoint
integrate_icypeas_to_find_a_professional: Integrate Icypeas to find a professional email address from a name and company domain, or verify whether an existing email is valid and deliverable. Results are returned asynchronously via polling.
terminal_search_status_found_debited_not: Terminal search status (FOUND, DEBITED, NOT_FOUND, DEBITED_NOT_FOUND, BAD_INPUT, INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS, ABORTED)
whether_the_email_is_valid_deliverable_v: Whether the email is valid/deliverable (verify-email only)
